title: colpart 5Pack丨Glue Trap Sticky Pads Traps Boards strong Stickiness ousehold Pest Sticky Boards strong for Indoor Home
bullet_points: Sturdy and Effective: Our sticky traps-5 packs are constructed with thickened cardboard, ensuring a strong and durable trap board. The material used provides excellent pulling force and super stickiness, making them highly effective in capturing pests.

Foldable and Versatile: Our Glue Trap Pads can be easily folded into various shapes. You can lay them flat or fold them into an ""L,"" ""U,"" or ""I"" shape to target specific areas where pests frequently appear. Once a pest is trapped, it becomes difficult for them to escape. These traps are also suitable for narrow spaces, offering flexibility in placement without limitations.

Safe and Environmentally Friendly: Our sticky glue collectors are odorless and free from harmful chemicals. They are harmless to both humans and pets. The cardboard material is stiffer, thicker, and designed to increase in size, reducing the chances of pests being dragged away when they struggle. Our sticky traps are secure and cannot be easily slipped away.
Convenient Disposal: When handling glue or trapped insects, we recommend using a trash bag for proper disposal. This ensures easy cleanup and minimizes contact with pests.

Wide Range of Applications: Our pest sticky Boards have a wide range of applications. They can be used in kitchens, gardens, restaurants, garages, basements, storage rooms, and more. These sticky traps effectively deal with various pests, including cockroaches, spiders, flies, moths, bedbugs, centipedes, and more."
